title: Brazen status — WS1.3 LANDED 87e21125; knip-unblock 730766ad; Radiant GO sent
body: T+~12min. Major progress. Sequence: WS1.3 (Lofty) landed at 87e21125 inside the pre-commit hook before my STOP became observable; clean commit; no --no-verify. Knip-unblock (Shaded) landed at 730766ad. Verified pnpm knip green standalone. Sent Radiant GO (cd5e1ffe) with pull-rebase + pnpm install reminders. Sent Lofty ack (322a3039) with next-cycle options (WS1.4 jsonld or WS1.5 canon parallel-safe). Two new frictions captured: STOP-signal race window during pre-commit hook; gate-state opacity between standalone probe and hook-run knip. Watching for Radiant WS2.1 SHA.
